evals.expected_output: PASS status, chart.yaml valid, INDEX.yaml valid, provenance integrity valid

evals.prompt: Validate chart with timezone '+4' instead of '+04:00'
evals.expected_output: FAIL status, error at birth.timezone with fix suggestion

evals.prompt: Validate chart where outputs/natal_longitudes.csv was deleted

evals.prompt: Check if chart is ready for delivery pack building
evals.expected_output: PASS/FAIL with recommendation, blocks pack build if invalid
